info.title: TNIQ by Ringer — Customer API
info.description:
External API for TNIQ customers.

Provides endpoints for:
- **SOA Operations** — Port request lifecycle (activate, cancel, release, disconnect, conflict, IntraSP)
- **Number Inventory** — Search, reserve, assign, release, audit, and report on telephone numbers
- **Toll-Free** — Somos TFN Registry integration (search, reserve, activate PTR, disconnect)
- **Messaging / 10DLC** — TCR brand and campaign registration, CNP election, number assignment
- **CNAM** — Caller Name ID management
- **ROC** — Responsible Organization Change workflows
- **Port Projects** — Bulk port order management with CSV/Excel upload
- **Port-Out Releases** — NPAC release management

Authentication: Include your API token in the Authorization header:
`Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN`

delete.description: Release a reserved toll-free number back to spare

auto_activation_mode.description: Auto-activation mode: DISABLED (manual), ASAP (immediate after DDD), SCHEDULED (specific datetime)

scheduled_activation_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime for scheduled activation (UTC). Required when mode is SCHEDULED. Must be >= DDD.

reset_failure_count.description: Set to true to reset the auto-activation failure counter back to 0

oldspid.description: 4-character losing SPID (auto-detected from current TN if not provided)

ddd.description: Port due date in ISO instant format (auto-set to tomorrow midnight UTC if not provided)
